questions.q: How should you think about "Projective points and lines" at this stage?
choices: P^2 extends affine geometry by homogeneous coordinates and points at infinity.
As a disconnected fact with no prerequisites
As a purely computational trick with no meaning
As optional notation not used elsewhere
questions.explain: The concept blurb summarizes the intended mental model for this section.
